properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v3 v6 v6 v3 v3 v6 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We've come to join the song Sung long before our lives To raise our voice along Heaven and earth alike

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We've seen Your faithful hand Your mercy without end A King who bled and died A God who sacrificed

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Be enthroned upon the praises Of a thousand generations You are worthy. Lord of all Unto You, the slain and risen King We lift our voice with heaven singing Worthy, Lord of all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All through this life we lead And on to eternity Our endless praise will cry Jesus be glorified

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All through this life we lead And on to eternity Our endless praise will cry Jesus be glorified Jesus be glorified

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Highest praises Lord of all Highest praises Lord of all Highest praises Lord of all| Highest praises Lord of all

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Be enthroned upon the praises Of a thousand generations You are worthy. Lord of all Unto You, the slain and risen King We lift our voice with heaven singing Worthy, Lord of all Lord of all
